name: libdata-dpath-perl
title: libdata-dpath-perl
summary: DPath is like XPath but for Perl data structures
description:
DPath is like XPath but for Perl data structures
With Data::DPath you can address points in a Perl data structure by
describing a "path" to it using hash keys, array indexes or some
wildcard-like steps.  It is inspired by XPath but differs from it.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use libdata-dpath-perl because DPath is like XPath but for Perl data structures.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use libdata-dpath-perl as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair libdata-dpath-perl with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `libdata-dpath-perl --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
